description_long: This object is a sleek, modern fighter jet with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, angular fuselage. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the body, giving it an aggressive, aerodynamic profile. The cockpit is located near the front and features a tinted, bubble-shaped canopy. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking two large jet exhausts. The surface is predominantly matte black with a subtle metallic sheen, and the jet appears to be constructed from advanced composite materials. No visible landing gear is present, and the overall design emphasizes speed and maneuverability.
description: A modern, matte black fighter jet with swept low wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward bubble canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the angular, swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet exhausts, dual vertical stabilizers, and the broad, angular wing shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the cockpit and rear stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with no visible winglets and moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted in the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
